body.body: Parse DSB/CSB design doc files (decisions_log.dsb, capabilities_index.dsb, gap_analysis.md, etc.) and mirror their content as FACTUAL/INTERPRETIVE nodes in Postgres. File remains canonical for editing. DB copy enables graph traversal and token-efficient context load (read top N newest entries rather than whole file). Sync on boot or on-demand via habit. Ref: D130, D131.
body.title: Mirror DSB/CSB docs as nodes in Postgres
